value: /usr/local/cpanel/scripts/buildeximconf && service exim restart && service dovecot restart
OpenProvider (Hosting Concepts B.V. d/b/a Registrar.eu, IANA ID 1647) is 1-grids reseller registrar for .com TLDs. WHOIS shows OpenProvider but domain IS through 1-grid.

LoadPlugin write_graphite
<Plugin write_graphite>
  <Node "main">
    Host "graphite.stats.1-grid.com"
    Protocol "tcp"
    LogSendErrors true
    Prefix "collectd.cpanel-shared."
    EscapeCharacter "_"
    SeparateInstances true
  </Node>
</Plugin>

Place in: /etc/collectd.d/00-graphite.conf

curl -LO https://get.gravitational.com/teleport-17.3.0-1.x86_64.rpm && yum install -y ./teleport-17.3.0-1.x86_64.rpm
Then: sudo bash -c "
#!/bin/sh
echo -e "An error has occurred. 
The token may be expired or invalid. 
Please check log for further details."
exit 1"
Configure /etc/teleport.yaml, then: systemctl enable --now teleport

systemctl stop teleport
pkill -f teleport
rm -rf /var/lib/teleport
rm -f /etc/teleport.yaml
yum remove teleport

version: v3
teleport:
  auth_token: "<token>"
  auth_server: "teleport.hostserv.co.za:3025"
  data_dir: /var/lib/teleport
auth_service:
  enabled: "no"
ssh_service:
  enabled: "yes"
proxy_service:
  enabled: "no"
for i in $(postqueue -p | grep refused | grep mailchannels | awk "{print $3}"| cut -d "[" -f2 | cut -d "]" -f1 | egrep "^[0-9]" | sort | uniq) ; do csf -ta $i 24h ; done ; postqueue -f ; postqueue -p

<IfModule mod_maxminddb.c>
    MaxMindDBEnable On
    MaxMindDBFile DB /path/to/GeoLite2-Country.mmdb
    MaxMindDBEnv COUNTRY_CODE DB/country/iso_code
    SetEnvIf COUNTRY_CODE ^ZA$ AllowCountry
    Order Deny,Allow
    Deny from all
    Allow from env=AllowCountry
</IfModule>
for i in $(cat list.txt); do /scripts/mailstorage_cpresetperms_home2.sh <server> $i; done
while IFS= read -r EMAIL; do doveadm force-resync -u "$EMAIL" INBOX; doveadm force-resync -u "$EMAIL" INBOX.*; doveadm index -u "$EMAIL" INBOX; doveadm index -u "$EMAIL" INBOX.*; done < email.txt

grep -rl "hacklinkmarket\|wp_core_check" /home/*/public_html/ to find; sed -i "/hacklink\|hacklinkmarket\|wp_core_check\|Telegram: https:\/\/t.me/d" to remove. Then change all passwords, add define("DISALLOW_FILE_EDIT", true); define("DISALLOW_FILE_MODS", true); to wp-config.php

Channel: [Ticket/Call]
Ticket #: XXXX
Domain: domain.co.za
Server IP: X.X.X.X
PTR: server.hostserv.co.za
Category:
Sub-category:
Description:
Outcome: Resolved on Contact

SSH into any server on the same cluster, then:
/scripts/killdns <domain>
This deletes the DNS zone from the cluster (linus nameservers). Works even if zone is on a different server in the same cluster (e.g., delete Parked03 zones from srv66).

/scripts/whoowns <domain>
Returns the cPanel username that owns a domain on the server.
Parked03 and srv66 are on the same cluster. You can delete any DNS zone on the cluster from any server on that cluster. Parked03 OS too old for Teleport - use srv66 instead.
/usr/local/cpanel/scripts/buildeximconf && service exim restart && service dovecot restart

title: Missing DKIM private key
content:
If DKIM shows Valid in WHM Email Deliverability but emails fail DKIM check, the private key file may be missing from the server.

Fix:
1. Check: ls -la /var/cpanel/domain_keys/private/<domain>
2. Generate: openssl genrsa -out /var/cpanel/domain_keys/private/<domain> 2048
3. Extract pub: openssl rsa -pubout -in /var/cpanel/domain_keys/private/<domain> -out /var/cpanel/domain_keys/public/<domain>
4. Restart Exim: /scripts/restartsrv_exim
5. Verify in logs: grep test@mail-tester.com /var/log/exim_mainlog

title: MailChannels delisting request
content:
When a client gets MailChannels block:
1. Submit delisting via MailChannels portal
2. Advise client to wait 1-2 hours
3. Ensure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC are correctly configured
4. Check sending patterns - no burst sending, confirmed opt-in lists only

title: Spam Titan license renewal
content:
Spam Titan panel: http://41.185.250.100 (inaccessible from this VPS).
Renewal done via 1-grid internal process.
When expired: incoming mail may be dropped, not queued.
